<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Search the knowledge base"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/knowledge-base/files/search"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Search knowledge base using vector similarity

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"knowledgeBaseFileIds":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"queryEmbedding":{"minItems":768,"maxItems":768,"type":"array","items":{"type":"number"}},"limit":{"default":5,"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":100},"similarityThreshold":{"type":"number","minimum":0,"maximum":1}},"required":["knowledgeBaseFileIds","queryEmbedding"]}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Default Response"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
